evals.prompt: Build a dashboard with 4 charts in React using Recharts: a line chart showing revenue over 12 months, a bar chart for top 5 products by sales, a pie chart for traffic sources, and an area chart for daily active users. All responsive.
evals.expected_output: 4 Recharts components with proper data formatting, responsive containers, and accessibility

assertions.name: four_charts
assertions.description: Line, bar, pie, and area chart components created

assertions.name: recharts_usage
assertions.description: Uses Recharts library components

assertions.name: responsive
assertions.description: Charts use ResponsiveContainer for sizing

assertions.name: data_formatting
assertions.description: Data formatted appropriately for each chart type

assertions.name: accessibility
assertions.description: Charts have labels, tooltips, and color-blind-safe palettes

evals.prompt: Create a real-time updating line chart that shows server response times (p50, p95, p99) over the last hour. Data updates every 5 seconds via WebSocket. Use Recharts in React.
evals.expected_output: Real-time chart with WebSocket data feed, sliding window, and multiple line series

assertions.name: websocket_integration
assertions.description: WebSocket connection for real-time data updates

assertions.name: sliding_window
assertions.description: Chart shows last 60 minutes, removing old data points

assertions.name: three_lines
assertions.description: Separate lines for p50, p95, p99 percentiles

assertions.name: auto_update
assertions.description: Chart updates every 5 seconds without full re-render

assertions.name: performance
assertions.description: Uses efficient rendering (not remounting on every update)

evals.prompt: Build a KPI card grid with sparkline trends. 4 cards: Total Revenue ($), Active Users, Conversion Rate (%), and Average Order Value ($). Each shows current value, delta from last period (up/down arrow with color), and a 7-day sparkline.
evals.expected_output: KPI card component with sparkline, delta indicator, and formatting per metric type

assertions.name: four_cards
assertions.description: All 4 KPI cards with correct metric names

assertions.name: sparkline
assertions.description: Small trend chart embedded in each card

assertions.name: delta_indicator
assertions.description: Up/down arrow with green/red color for positive/negative change

assertions.name: value_formatting
assertions.description: Currency, percentage, and number formatting appropriate per metric

assertions.name: responsive
assertions.description: Grid adapts to screen size (4→2→1 columns)

evals.prompt: Create a data table with inline bar charts in the cells. Each row is a product showing: name, sales count, revenue (with bar showing relative to max), and growth percentage (with color-coded badge). Sortable columns.
evals.expected_output: Table with inline visualization, sortable headers, and formatted data

assertions.name: inline_bars
assertions.description: Revenue column shows proportional bar within the cell

assertions.name: color_badges
assertions.description: Growth percentage uses green/red color coding

assertions.name: sortable
assertions.description: Column headers clickable to sort

assertions.name: data_formatting
assertions.description: Revenue formatted as currency, growth as percentage

assertions.name: responsive
assertions.description: Table handles overflow on small screens

evals.prompt: Build a funnel chart showing our sign-up conversion: Landing Page (10000) → Sign Up Started (3500) → Email Verified (2800) → Profile Completed (2100) → First Project (1500). Show drop-off rates between steps.
evals.expected_output: Funnel visualization with step counts, drop-off percentages, and visual width scaling

assertions.name: funnel_shape
assertions.description: Visual funnel with decreasing widths per step

assertions.name: five_steps
assertions.description: All 5 funnel steps with correct counts

assertions.name: drop_off_rates
assertions.description: Percentage drop-off shown between each step

assertions.name: conversion_rate
assertions.description: Overall conversion rate calculated (landing to first project)

assertions.name: interactive
assertions.description: Hover or click on steps shows details
